metadata.description: Live German radiation-monitoring skills powered by the strahlenschutz-cli (BfS ODL-Info ambient gamma dose-rate network)

plugins.name: strahlenschutz
plugins.description: Rank the live ambient gamma dose rate (ODL) across Germany's ~1700 BfS stations, read a single station's time-series trend, and export the network as GeoJSON — all over the open, key-free ODL-Info WFS via the strahlenschutz-cli.
